description_long: This is a rectangular wooden office desk with a light oak finish, featuring a solid, flat top surface suitable for writing or working. On the left side, there are three horizontally aligned drawers with yellow-colored fronts, providing storage space for office supplies or documents. The right side of the desk is supported by a solid panel, while the left side is partially open beneath the drawers, allowing for legroom. The base of the desk is slightly recessed, giving it a stable yet visually lighter appearance. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a practical layout. The materials and construction suggest it is intended for indoor use, such as in an office, study, or reception area.
description: A modern light oak office desk with three yellow-fronted drawers on the left and a solid panel on the right, featuring a flat, spacious work surface. The design is clean and functional, suitable for office or study environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid wood panel and the recessed base, with no drawers visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wooden side panel and a hint of the yellow drawer fronts.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the three yellow-fronted drawers on the left and the open leg space on the right.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a plain wooden panel with no visible drawers or openings.
